fields.name: Description
fields.default: As a digital creative, your laptop or tablet is at the center of your work. Keep your device safe with a fabric sleeve that matches in quality and looks.

default.title: Minimal and thoughtful
default.description: Our laptop sleeve is compact and precisely fits 13" devices. The zipper allows you to access the interior with ease.

default.title: Refined details
default.description: We design every detail with the best materials and finishes. This laptop sleeve features durable canvas with double-stitched construction.
